content.en:
"That's right, the current combat power of this Ao Chen's replica body is comparable to that of the reincarnation celestial clan that has awakened five times, if you cast the spear of the ruin sky, it is enough to severely damage the reincarnation celestial clan that has awakened six times, and you can go and explore!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He has been here for a long time, and his knowledge of this place is naturally not comparable at the beginning.

According to the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, this place is called the Reincarnation Dark Domain.

Outside of the reincarnation realm, there are other areas, but he doesn't know about them yet.

The Reincarnation Dark Realm is completely controlled by the Reincarnation Celestial Race, and there are about hundreds of slave races under its command.

These hundreds of slave races are not weak, and they all have many Origin Upper Realm overlords, but due to the lack of high-end combat power, they naturally cannot resist the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

The Reincarnation Dark Domain has a lot of treasures, but many places are controlled by the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, and those slave races have no chance to go there to find resources.

It can be said that the slave race had very few places to go, and there was almost no freedom.

But to Ye Tian's surprise, among these hundreds of slave races, there was no cursed dragon clan.

Obviously, the area connected by the Tai'er Curse Dragon may not be the reincarnation dark domain, and he doesn't know exactly where it is connected.

There are many treasures in the reincarnation dark domain, but for a while, he didn't think about which treasure land to go to.

However, on this day, he found that Tunxi had gathered more than a dozen slave races and left Fengyu City.

......

"What are you going to do?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

At the beginning, his Red Skull Giant Replica Body was captured by Swallow Xi, saying that he was going to take him to a place after a while.

Now it seems that Tunxi has taken action.

Not only Swallowing Xi, Ye Tian also found that many reincarnation celestial clans had set off, and they all brought many Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the slave race, but most of them were Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had awakened their bloodline.

Ye Tian has not yet completely integrated into the circle of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and he has no backer.

Therefore, it is not clear to him what happened now.

However, he could follow them over and have a look.

With Ye Tian's strength, tracking and swallowing them, he will naturally not be discovered, even if he is discovered by the powerful Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, he will not do anything to him.

After all, his current identity is also a reincarnation celestial!

After a period of time, Tunxi led more than a dozen Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the slave race to a place in the Dark Realm of Reincarnation.

This should be a newly discovered treasure in the reincarnation dark domain, and Ye Tian didn't know about its existence.

At this time.

In addition to swallowing Xi, Ye Tian also saw a familiar figure - Blood Howl.

At the beginning, he first encountered a blood howl, and for this reason, he sacrificed the Innocent Demon Vine to copy his body.

"When Swallowing Xi meets Blood Howl, this will definitely meet the Red Skull Giant that I copied!"

However, there is nothing wrong with this, at most it is just a matter of letting Swallow Xi and Blood Howl meet, thus creating a little contradiction.

Really.

Swallowing Xi and Blood Howl encountered, and she also saw the Origin Upper Realm Overlords brought by Blood Howl, and her eyes were fixed on one of the Red Skull Giants.

"You're not dead?"

Tunxi said coldly.

This Red Skull Giant had obviously offended a powerful member of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and was killed casually, how could he be alive here?

This is not normal!

Soon, she guessed a reason, that is, the red skull giant took refuge in Blood Howl, and Blood Howl released control for him, and the so-called killing may have been just acting.

"Bloodhowl, you have gone too far, snatching my slaves, you are also one of the heirs of Lord Ice Ruin, for the sake of a slave, give me a ??? acting" Tunxi scolded.

Blood howl looked confused.

He didn't offend Tunxi, Tunxi came up directly to Xingshi and asked about the crime, what is this doing?

"What are you talking about, when did I rob your slave???s?

"He's my slave, and now he's here with you, not the ??? you've robbed," Tunxi asked, pointing at the Red Skull Giant.

Blood Howl sneered: "Swallow Xi, this slave has been following me for hundreds of millions of primeval years, and I cultivated it single-handedly, you say it's your slave? Are you funny?"

"You think I'll believe it?"

Tunxi wanted to go berserk.

Then.

Other members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan came to dissuade them.

Under the dissuasion of other members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, they didn't really make trouble.

As time passed, more and more members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan arrived.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian also appeared, attracting the attention of many reincarnation celestial clans.

"Who is this guy?"

Many reincarnation celestial clans don't know Ye Tian, but there are also reincarnation celestial clans who have been to the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, so they naturally think of Ye Tian.

"He is Ao Chen, a waste of the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan, who doesn't know how to suddenly awaken, and is still able to fight beyond the level. But his current strength should only be comparable to that of the Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, how dare he come here, can't he find death?" a member of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan wondered.

"Where is this?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

This question made the other reincarnation celestial clans suddenly realize, no wonder Ye Tian dared to come here, it turned out that he didn't know!

"Aochen, this is not the place you should be, let's go!"

Swallow Xi transmitted the sound to Ye Tian.

"Your Excellency Tunxi, please tell me one or two, why are so many clansmen here with so many slaves?" Ye Tian also asked.

Tunxi did not hide Ye Tian.

She wouldn't tell the slaves, but she would have no problem telling the members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

"This is a newly opened treasure land of our Reincarnation Heavenly Clan-Reincarnation Ruins, this place is very dangerous, and the sixth-time Origin Upper Realm Overlord can't enter it, so only five-awakened clansmen are allowed to come here at most. And this place is too dangerous to fall, so bring some slaves in and let them explore, so you can save your life. Tunxi still said.

Use slaves to find your way!

This is tantamount to sacrificing this Origin Upper Realm Overlord Slave, anyway, the Eternal Upper Realm must be incredible, and it is impossible for any Eternal Upper Realm Overlord-level force to sacrifice any Origin Upper Realm Overlord!

But in the dark realm of reincarnation, the slave race has no status at all, and the sacrifice is sacrificed, and no matter how many slave races there are, it is not as good as the life of a member of the reincarnation celestial race!

That's when it happened.

The entire reincarnation ruins released nine-colored light, enveloping this side of the void.

Seeing this scene, the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan were excited.

"It's on, hurry inside!"

Immediately, they broke in with the slaves.

And Ye Tian also went in directly.
